text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 
156 
GAP_MO_COPAY_OS 
LABEL: 
Gap Mail Order Pharmacy Copay for other days’ supply 
DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the beneficiary co-payment amount for a day’s supply of the drugs (other than 
1- or 3- months) on this tier, using a mail order pharmacy during the coverage gap phase of the Part D 
benefit. 
SHORT NAME: — 
LONG NAME: GAP_MO_COPAY_OS 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
8
